response.step_by_step_log: The video is a concert performance featuring two virtual idols (VTubers), Kobo Kanaeru and another character. They perform a song titled 'Sayonara no Mae ni'. I searched for this title along with 'Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: A performance by Kobo Kanaeru and another VTuber of the song 'Sayonara no Mae ni' during a concert event.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and another VTuber perform 'Sayonara no Mae ni' on a stage with animated background elements including stars, clouds, and a rainbow.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
さよならの前に
愛してるのに、愛せない

あの日交わした約束も
今では遠い夢のよう

もしもあの時言えてたら
何かは変わっていたかな

さよならの前に
もう一度だけ抱きしめて

さよならの前に
君の笑顔を焼き付けて

たとえ離れても
心は繋がっているから

さよならの前に
伝えたい言葉があるよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Before the goodbye
I love you, but I can't love you

The promise we made that day
Is now like a distant dream

If only I had said it back then
Would something have changed?

Before the goodbye
Hold me one more time

Before the goodbye
Burn your smile into my memory

Even if we are apart
Our hearts are still connected

Before the goodbye
I have words I want to tell you
